description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish bag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsPurple corduroy bag with overlapping flaps One main zippered compartment with star shaped puller detailInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsBrand patch at sideOne short gathered strap for carrying easeMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 48 cm
